title: Unraveling the Genetic and Molecular Architecture of Autism Spectrum Disorder: Implications for Clinical Genetics and Genomic Diagnostics
abstract_snippet: Review of ASD genetic architecture including CNVs, SNVs, polygenic/multifactorial aspects, epigenetics. Covers SHANK3, SYNGAP1, CHD8 etc.
summary: Review of ASD genetic architecture covering CNVs, SNVs, de novo vs inherited, polygenic contributions, and convergent pathways (transcriptional regulation, chromatin remodeling, synaptic function). Reviews diagnostic yield of array-CGH/WES/WGS. Covers many atlas genes. Useful as reference review.
